title: Till
content:

{{Quote|Well… I'm not saying I believe in ghost ships or anything, but you've gotta admit there's been a lot of unexplained happenings in these parts for the last forty years since the Battle of Dreighton.|Till, to Commander Jenn|audio=Till-RAII.flac|<ref name="RAII" />}}
'''Till''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served as an [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during a routine patrol of the [[Dreighton Triangle]] when one of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] new [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantom]] starfighters used its [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] to take his [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] by surprise, damaging [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Jenn]]'s [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] and causing her fighter to collide with his; both [[Starship/Legends|craft]] were destroyed in the ensuing explosion.

==Biography==
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Till joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]<ref name="RAII" /> at some point around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> holding the rank of [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]]. He had yet to experience [[Starfighter combat/Legends|combat]]<ref name="LA">{{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_stry.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Original Story}}</ref> when, following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]],<ref name="NEC" /> he was assigned to a routine patrol mission around the [[Dreighton Triangle]] as part of a [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] of three [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Jenn]]. Unbeknownst to the [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was using the region to conduct a series of tests of the new [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantom]], a starfighter fitted with a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] that rendered it invisible to other [[Starship/Legends|vessels]], using reports of unexplained events in the region ever since the [[Battle of Dreighton]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] as a cover for their operations. The fighter group's initial pass failed to detect any signs of activity, and Jenn ordered one more pass before returning to base. However, mere [[Standard second|seconds]] later, a TIE Phantom de-cloaked behind the commander's X-wing and opened [[Laser/Legends|fire]] on the group. The resulting damage to her [[Stabilizer/Legends|stabilizers]] caused her to spin out of control toward Till's X-wing. Till was unable to get clear in time, and both fighters were destroyed, [[Death/Legends|killing]] both pilots.<ref name="RAII" />

==Personality and traits==
During his time with the Alliance, Till was still young and inexperienced, with a tendency to talk a lot during tense situations. While serving with Jenn, Till developed a good friendship with his commander, who teased him frequently.<ref name="LA" /> When assigned to patrol the [[Dreighton Nebula/Legends|Dreighton Nebula]], he expressed his concerns about the stories of [[ghost ship]]s in the region to Jenn and hoped to return to base as soon as possible.<ref name="RAII" /> Till had not experienced a combat situation prior to his final mission,<ref name="LA" /> and, due to the TIE Phantom's cloaking device, he died without even seeing his attacker.<ref name="RAII" /><ref name="LA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Till was created for the [[1995]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'', in which he appears during the opening cutscene. The character was portrayed in the game by actor [[Michael Aron]].<ref name="RAII" />

[[File:ROTJ_Y-wing_helmet_5_SW_Costumes.jpg|thumb|right|210px|Y-wing pilot helmet from ''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'' reused for Till]]
''Rebel Assault II'' designer [[Vincent Lee]]'s storyboards and scripts document, dated [[November 16]], [[1994]], included a brief description of Till.<ref name="RL">''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]''</ref> Though not included in the game or its manual,<ref name="RAII" /> the biography was adapted for use on the LucasArts website,<ref name="LA" /> and the document was later printed in [[Rob Smith]]'s ''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]''.<ref name="RL" /> The online biography gives no indication of Till's age,<ref name="LA" /> but Lee's original notes placed the character in his early twenties. Lee also made notes on the people he thought symbolized each character in the game, choosing actor [[Woody Harrelson]] to represent Till. An early storyboard of the scene in which Till appears reveals that his flight group was originally called "[[Gamma]] patrol,"<ref name="RL" /> but the group was unnamed in the final game.<ref name="RAII" />

Props and costumes created for the [[original trilogy]] of ''[[Star Wars]]'' movies were used during the filming of ''Rebel Assault II''.<ref name="LAV">{{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_vid.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Live Action Video}}</ref> The [[Flight helmet/Legends|flight helmet]] worn by Till—and by [[Unidentified B-wing pilot|other pilots]] seen in the game—was one originally created for a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] pilot in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="SWC">''[[Star Wars Costumes: The Original Trilogy]]''</ref>
